summary: NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering Ehrlichiosis and Anaplasmosis (Anaplasma phagocytophilum and Ehrlichia chaffeensis infections) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2019. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2018 and 2019.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering perinatal Hepatitis C infection and influenza-associated pediatric mortality cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering carbapenemase-producing carbapenem-resistant Enterobacteriaceae (CP-CRE), Chancroid, and Chlamydia trachomatis infection cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering hemolytic uremic syndrome post-diarrheal, acute Hepatitis A, and acute Hepatitis B cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering cholera and Coccidioidomycosis cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering Ehrlichiosis and Anaplasmosis (Anaplasma phagocytophilum and Ehrlichia chaffeensis infections) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering invasive pneumococcal disease (age <5, confirmed and probable) and Legionellosis cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering Ehrlichiosis and Anaplasmosis (Ehrlichia ewingii, undetermined) and Giardiasis cases reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering arboviral diseases (Jamestown Canyon, La Crosse, Powassan virus diseases) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

NNDSS provisional notifiable disease surveillance table covering arboviral diseases (St. Louis encephalitis virus and West Nile virus) reported weekly and cumulatively by U.S. state/territory for 2022. Columns include current week counts, 52-week maximums, and cumulative totals for 2021 and 2022.

CDC genomic surveillance data tracking SARS-CoV-2 nasal lineages detected over time. Columns include counts or proportions for specific viral lineages including BA.2.75, XFG, NB.1.8.1, BF.7, EG.5, JN.1, BA.5, BA.3.2, LB.1, and BA.2.

CDC Vision and Eye Health Surveillance System (VEHSS) Medicare 100% data for 2021-2022 tracking vision and eye health indicators for Medicare beneficiaries. Columns include location ID, risk factor ID, age group, data value type, response ID, question ID, category ID, topic ID, geolocation, and confidence limits.

CDC Antibiotic Resistance Patient Safety Atlas (ARPSP) IQVIA antibiotic use data tracking outpatient antibiotic prescribing rates. Columns include year, sex, location, antibiotic class, age group, and rate.

CDC TGS SARS-CoV-2 nasal positivity surveillance data tracking weekly COVID-19 testing positivity rates by WHO region. Columns include week of collection, total positive individuals, WHO region, umbrella account ID, individual positivity rate, and total participants.
CDC website analytics data tracking page views and visits for cdc.gov from 2019 to 2024. Columns include week number, visit count, page view count, and metric year.
CDC Data Query System (DQS) advanced filter reference table for health data indicators. Columns include subtopic, data shortname, classification, classification ID, filter, and topic.

CDC weekly RSV vaccination coverage data for U.S. adults aged 60-74 with high-risk conditions and adults 75+ comparing cumulative vaccination rates between demographic groups. Columns include age group, confidence interval estimates, demographic level, comparison groups, week ending date, and statistical significance.

CDC healthcare personnel (HCP) influenza vaccination coverage data for healthcare facilities. Columns include vaccination counts for employees, non-employee licensed personnel, and other personnel, along with declination and medical exemption counts by state.
